amazing.title: Amazing.com E-commerce
amazing.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Includes user authentication, product management, shopping cart, order processing, and address management.

todo.title: Todo App (.NET + React)
todo.description: Full-stack todo application with real-time task synchronization via SignalR. Provides live updates for multiple users with a .NET Core Web API and React client.

blogui.title: Creative Blog UI
blogui.description: Modern blog and portfolio UI built with React, Vite, and Material-UI. Features particle animations, i18n language support, and interactive UI components.

jobtrack.title: JobTrack
jobtrack.description: Self-hosted web application for end-to-end job application management. Offers applications, resumes, tasks, time tracking, and optional AI resume review / job matching features.
features: Multiple resume and cover letter management
Optional AI: resume review & job matching

logops.title: LogOps Panel
logops.description: Voice note plugin for Obsidian. Transforms voice into structured notes with recording, Whisper transcription, optional LLM refinement, RAG, and vault integration.
features: Voice recording and live level indicator

collabcode.title: CollabCode
collabcode.description: Real-time collaborative code editor with React, Express, and Socket.IO. Supports simultaneous editing for multiple users and easy deployment with Docker.
features: Separate frontend and backend development workflow

aipm.title: AI Project Management
aipm.description: Full-stack project management tool focused on workspace, team, tasks, and reporting. NestJS + React architecture with a streaming AI assistant, real-time updates, and optional GitHub context.
features: Streaming AI chat and tool integrations

matchengine.title: Submicro Match Engine
matchengine.description: Low-latency, high-throughput exchange matching engine written in C++20. HFT infrastructure focused on lock-free queues, TCP/UDP multicast, and sub-microsecond order processing.

aicvmaker.title: AI CV Maker
aicvmaker.description: AI-powered CV creation application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Focuses on structuring CV content with a modern App Router architecture.
